__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB
__inputs.description: InfluxDB v2 data source with Flux query language

description: Phone dashboard — historical air quality graphs for all rooms

targets.query:
from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "bedroom_co2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Bedroom")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "livingroom_co2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Living Room")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "kitchen_co2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Kitchen")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "bedroom_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 9.0 / 5.0 + 32.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Bedroom")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "livingroom_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 9.0 / 5.0 + 32.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Living Room")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "kitchen_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 9.0 / 5.0 + 32.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Kitchen")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "bedroom_humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Bedroom")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "livingroom_humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Living Room")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "kitchen_humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Kitchen")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "kitchen_voc_index")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Kitchen VOC")

panels.description: Power draw of air purifiers in watts. Requires Sonoff S31 Tasmota power monitoring to be enabled and entity names to be confirmed in HA. Typical entity names: sensor.kitchen_purifier_power, sensor.living_room_purifier_power.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "kitchen_purifier_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Kitchen Purifier")

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "living_room_purifier_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Living Room Purifier")

panels.title: Purifier Power (W)
